samples.raw_doc: This shelf takedown of $200 million of common stock will be used for general corporate purposes and to fund the Phase II clinical trial.

expected.dilution_event_quote: shelf takedown of $200 million of common stock

samples.raw_doc: We are conducting an at-the-market offering of up to $50 million of common stock. Proceeds will fund commercialization activities.

expected.dilution_event_quote: at-the-market offering of up to $50 million of common stock
